description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel rectangular caseDial style: Black dial with branding and date display below the 12 hour mark, has gold toned hands with white inlay and white markingsFeatures: Screw to reset timeStrap style: Black, leather strap with a tang claspWater resistantComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year from the date of purchase
